message:
chore(sitemap): refresh sitemap timestamps

Updated lastmod timestamps for all 31 URLs in sitemap.xml.
No structural changes - just timestamp refresh from build.

URLs remain unchanged:
- Homepage (priority 1.0)
- Bundles, workflows, help pages (priority 0.7-0.9)
- All prompt detail pages
- Legal pages (terms, privacy, guidelines)
- CLI documentation pages

Admin routes continue to be excluded per next-sitemap.config.js.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
